{{Quote|Horororibb, Boofer.|Ilena Xan pairing Horororibb with Boofer.|<ref name="YDR" />}}
'''Horororibb''' was a [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] studying at the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Horororibb was inducted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and received [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Horororibb remained at the Temple and participated in the [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]]. Administrated by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ilena Xan]], Horororibb competed against fellow Initiate [[Boofer]] in the first round.<ref name="YDR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
